Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naraka waystation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Naraka waystation is located inside the city walls on the north side of Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — The Naraka waystation contains a fifteen-foot-tall obelisk of black stone marked with twisting golden runes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Simon runs to the Naraka waystation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Naraka waystation is a building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — The Naraka waystation is a location that can be targeted with Gold Light blasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Alin can blast the corners of the Naraka waystation to rubble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Alin walks up to the Naraka waystation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The ruins of the Naraka waystation are in the Blue District.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
